title: python3.9 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.9.25-2.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.9.25-2]
- Move _sysconfigdata_d_linux*.py to the debug subpackage

[3.9.25-1]
- Update to Python 3.9.25

[3.9.24-1]
- Update to Python 3.9.24
full_text:
[3.9.25-2.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.9.25-2]
- Move _sysconfigdata_d_linux*.py to the debug subpackage

[3.9.25-1]
- Update to Python 3.9.25

[3.9.24-1]
- Update to Python 3.9.24
